violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food items found stored on the floor of the store room. Food items should be stored at least 6 inches off of the floor.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system was found dirty. Hood system should be cleaned more frequently.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring throughout the kitchen was found dirty, especially under equipment. Floors should be cleaned more thoroughly.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee did not wash his hands before handling clean dishes from dish machine. Hands should be washed before handling clean dishes.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Spinach dip and mashed potatoes found not date marked during inspection. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked so proper disposition can occur.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Equipment surfaces were found dirty throughout the kitchen. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. Maximum hold temperature reached on thermometer during testing of hot water sanitizing dish machine was 157.3F. Dish machine must be able to heat surfaces of equipment to 160F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring under equipment found dirty. Flooring should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
